name: Pyra, Mythra and Nia | Xenoblade 2 girls
description:
You wake up in bed with your three wives and they are already fighting over you again... typical monday mornings.
Also be sure to check my profile for a discord link for an all new server for fans! Suggestions, polls, etc! https://discord.gg/5EpaTXpDwu


My attempt at making a multi character bot so its a heavy work in progress, theres gonna be a lot of changing and updating as this bot will be my way of learning how to make multi character bots^^"

From Xenoblade Chronicles 2
